mainText:
Promo: "At Bank of Entitlement, we believe overdraft fees are a thing of the past. Join us now for exclusive perks and VIP treatment!"

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: I once demanded a refund at a coffee shop because my latte wasn't piping hot enough. When the barista politely explained that the temperature was standard, I dramatically poured the drink on the floor, shouting, "I can't believe you're serving liquid garbage!" The manager, taken aback by my audacity, refunded me on the spot and offered a free pastry to compensate for the "trauma" I experienced. As I walked out triumphantly with my refund and bonus treat, I couldn't help but revel in my entitlement, knowing that my taste buds deserved only the finest, scalding coffee.
